title: DATA STRUCTURE AND QUALITY CONTROL NEUROCHEMISTRY_H PIPELINE (CONNExIN 2025)
steps: Define project directories: $BIDS_DIR- root of BIDS dataset (e.g., "~/bids_dataset") $RAW_DICOM_DIR- source DICOMs (e.g., "~/raw_dicom/sub-064/ses-03/func")
Convert DICOM to NlfTI: NIfTI + JSON (keep BIDS names)
Motion assessment: Calculate frame wise displacement using FSL (e.g. mcflirt -in "$FMRI" -out motion_corrected -plots -rmsrel -rmsabs)
Generate motion plots: Create motion parameter visualization (e.g. fsl_motion_outliers -i "$FMRI" -o motion_outliers.txt --fd --thresh=0.2 -p motion_plot)
Signal-To-Noise-Ratio: Calculate temporal SNR using AFNI (available in NeuroDesktop) (e.g. 3dTstat -cvarinv -prefix tSNR "$FMRI")
creator: akinkunmi phoebe
